biological_replicate: brain tissues from both hypoxia-treated and untreated male and female zebrafish were isolated (n = 6 per group)
technical_replicate: three technical replicates were run in LC-MS/MS
experimental_design: by comparing hypoxia male (HM) vs. normoxia male (NM) and hypoxia female (HF) vs. normoxia female (NF)
factor_value: hypoxia male (HM) vs. normoxia male (NM) and hypoxia female (HF) vs. normoxia female (NF)
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
